untranslatable_reason: The Double Top pattern requires multi-bar structure detection (identifying two distinct tops with a valley, measuring inter-top distance in weeks, comparing top heights within 0-3%, and measuring valley depth at 10-20%). These geometric/structural pattern properties cannot be expressed using only single-bar price, moving average, and oscillator indicators. Required: pattern recognition engine or candle sequence analyzer.
translation_notes: While the entry condition 'close below confirmation point (lowest low between tops)' can be approximated using Donchian Channel lower band, this misses the core pattern logic: detecting two peaks, validating their similarity, measuring the valley, and confirming the breakout sequence. The AUTHOR_SILENT stop loss and target parameters indicate these should be pattern-derived, not indicator-based. Volume comparison and inter-top timing constraints also require multi-bar structural analysis beyond available indicators.
